author: nflaig
content: let's create a thread, otherwise this is too chaotic in the channel here 😅

author: jvranek
content:
hey so realized an important clarifier while integrating this from the commit-boost side following <@780792191244566529> 's request to "canonicalize the request auth url bytes". I interpreted this as stripping out the path as well because it makes sense to be able to cache the same auth across both getExecutionPayloadBid and submitBuilderPreferences. To be extra clear sign over https://builder.example.com **not**  https://builder.example.com/eth/v1/builder/execution_payload_bid/..... and  https://builder.example.com/eth/v1/builder/submit_builder_preferences/...

so the [latest commit](https://github.com/ethereum/builder-specs/pull/165/changes/3dadb3a370b64907740eb24edc2b45b1e7d984a5) is making it explicit that `request_auth.data.url = canonicalize(full_url)`
